creator: andrew@sign.chg.ru
text:
How-To-Repeat: 
	
cd /usr/ports/x11/kde11 && make
The following output occures:

...............................

g++295 -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I.. -I/usr/local/include -I/usr/X11R6/include/X11/qt  -I/usr/X11R6/include -I. -I. -I..    -O -pipe -I/usr/local/include -c notify.moc.cpp
